name: charbbie's base
shortDesc: A massive modern house overlooking the big river.

name: jeginaaa's mega zoo
shortDesc: A massive wildlife sanctuary containing every single tamable creature on the server. Includes a massive water elevator she refuses to use.

name: DimpledDwarf's graveyard
shortDesc: A sprawling, scenic graveyard built entirely to commemorate the absurd amount of times they have respawned.

name: plainpixie's armory
shortDesc: A beautifully organized, heavily lit underground bunker packed with fully stocked adventure kits, shulker boxes, and potions for the group.

name: LordMalcolm's quarry
shortDesc: An aggressively large hole in the ground extending all the way to bedrock. Yielded almost no actual diamonds, but generated infinite dirt stacks.

name: Brautistic's emergency vault
shortDesc: A single hidden 2x2 room containing absolutely zero chests because everything valuable is carried directly in his inventory at all times.

name: zephyr707's communal bedroom
shortDesc: A massive public hotel structure containing 50 beds, none of which actually belong to zephyr707, but all of which they will sleep in anyway.

name: yihua's lava observation deck
shortDesc: A glass safety platform built directly over a massive lava lake down at minus coordinates, engineered specifically to stop accidental falling incidents.
